content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于<t:1756311600:F>
进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年9月10日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
● 修复了唤醒体「哈姆林」衍生卡「协乐的交响」选择「上行音」和「下行音」时，排列顺序不固定的问题，现在「上行音」固定出现在左侧。
● 修复了唤醒体「奥尔拉」的技能「幻梦诗篇」词缀「喜」预览描述数值错误为 0 的问题。
● 修复了「星辰篇」关卡中，使用银钥觉醒后，若手牌上限已满，则我方生命条下方会错误出现感叹号图标的问题。
● 修复了怪物「超维▲▲之蛹」的「宇宙幽能」状态描述中状态名错误显示为「虚空幽能」的问题。
● 修复了在「命轮叠位」中快速点击叠位时，小概率出现导致界面卡住的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「哈姆林」灵塑适性「打出灵感时获得的临时力量」效果会随战斗波次提高的问题，这个问题在 8 月 20 日已通过服务器更新修复，现进行补充说明。
● 修复了一些在输入邀请码后可能出现活动过期提示的问题，这个问题在 8 月 21 日已通过服务器更新修复，现进行补充说明。
● 修复了「不朽极昼」中剧情文本显示错误的问题。

V2.3.1.4 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on <t:1756311600:F> . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on September 10, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
● Fixed the issue where the order of selecting "Ascending Scale" and "Descending Scale" on the derived card "Symphony of Harmony" of Awakener "Hameln" was not fixed. "Ascending Scale" now always appears on the left.
● Fixed the issue where the preview description value of the Affix "Happiness" in the Awakener "Horla's" Skill "Carol Psalm" was incorrectly displayed as 0.
● Fixed an issue where, in "Astral Reign" stages, after using Keyflare Rouse, an incorrect exclamation mark icon would appear below the player's HP bar if the hand was already at maximum size.
● Fixed the issue where the state name in the description of the monster "Ultra ▲▲ Pupa"'s "Cosmic Ether" state was incorrectly displayed as "Void Ether".
● Fixed a rare issue where the interface could freeze when rapidly tapping to stack during "Wheel of Destiny Ascension".
● Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Hameln" Soulforge Aptitude "Gain Temporary STR when playing Insight" effect increased with battle waves. This issue was already resolved via a server update on August 20, and this serves as a supplementary explanation.
● Fixed an issue where the activity expiration prompt might appear after entering an invitation code. This issue was resolved via a server update on August 21, and this is a supplementary explanation.
● Fixed the issue with incorrect story text display in "Everburning Vex".
🎬V1.5 上篇概念PV「獻給春天的花束」┊PV-Final Bouquet for Spring
